projects.name: News-Watcher
projects.description: Multi-account Twitter monitoring for trading signals. Polls tweets every 30-60s, uses AI to classify signals, sends Pushover notifications for high-priority events.
projects.stack: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL (Railway), Claude AI, Pushover
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from research agents for signal enrichment, MCP integrations for additional data sources, automated quality monitoring agents

projects.name: News-Watcher-v2
projects.description: Rebuilt version of News-Watcher on modern stack with Supabase backend and Vercel frontend.
projects.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Drizzle ORM, Supabase, RapidAPI, Vercel
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from multi-agent research patterns, orchestrated ingestion pipelines, MCP servers for Supabase integration

projects.name: Onchain Backtester
projects.description: Backtests crypto trading strategies using on-chain metrics from Santiment. 3,354 days of BTC data with 7 metrics and TradingView charts.
projects.stack: Next.js 14, Drizzle ORM, Supabase, TradingView Lightweight Charts, Google Sheets (SanSheets)
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from test-generation agents, data pipeline skills, automated strategy analysis agents

projects.name: DeFi Arb Monitor
projects.description: Stablecoin arbitrage tracker monitoring sUSDAI on Arbitrum and sUSDe on Ethereum. Checks prices every 15 minutes, calculates APR, sends threshold alerts.
projects.stack: Next.js, Supabase Edge Functions (Deno), PostgreSQL, viem, CoW Protocol API, Pushover
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from monitoring agents, MCP servers for DeFi data, automated alert tuning

projects.name: WyndLabs Monitor
projects.description: Monorepo with Playwright scraper, SQLite database, and Next.js dashboard for tracking WyndLabs activity.
projects.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Playwright, SQLite, Recharts, Tailwind v4, Railway
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from web scraping agents, scheduled task orchestration, MCP data tools

projects.name: Meal Planner
projects.description: AI-powered meal planning application with recipe generation and nutritional tracking.
projects.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Supabase, OpenAI SDK, shadcn/ui, Tailwind v4, Zod, vitest
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from content-generation skills, user-facing AI agents, automated testing agents

projects.name: Investment Monitor
projects.description: Multi-agent system tracking investments with automated research. Three-layer architecture: researchers gather data from web/Twitter, specialists analyze by domain, synthesizer maintains living thesis documents.
projects.stack: Claude Code agents, file-based, RapidAPI Twitter, Node.js scripts
projects.claude_code_usage: Heavy -- 12+ agents, multi-agent orchestration, Twitter skill, finding-router, specialist analysts, slash commands (/check, /deep-analysis)
projects.opportunities: Most likely to benefit from ANY new CC capability. New orchestration features, memory improvements, agent team patterns, worktree support for parallel analysis, MCP servers for financial data

projects.name: Analyst-2.0
projects.description: Company analysis framework using WAT (Workflows, Agents, Tools) pattern. Workflows are SOPs in markdown, agents make decisions, tools are deterministic Python scripts.
projects.stack: WAT framework, Python scripts, Claude Code agents
projects.claude_code_usage: Moderate -- agent-based analysis with structured workflows
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from new agent composition patterns, skill layering, structured output improvements

projects.name: Discord Scraper
projects.description: Early-stage project to scrape Discord server messages and query them with LLM. Still in planning phase.
projects.opportunities: Could benefit from MCP server for Discord, data pipeline agents, knowledge base patterns from this project

user_context.background: Non-technical, no-code background with some introductory Python experience
user_context.primary_interest: Building practical tools that run with minimal manual intervention
user_context.claude_code_experience: Intermediate-to-advanced -- actively uses agents, skills, commands, multi-agent orchestration, memory systems
user_context.most_advanced_project: Investment Monitor (multi-agent pipeline with 12+ specialized agents)
user_context.preferred_stack: Next.js, Supabase, Vercel for web apps; Claude Code agents for automation
